name: AI Training Quality Pipeline
description: End-to-end pipeline that evaluates model quality, learns from feedback, grounds responses, and sets up observability. Run this after every major model update.

steps.task: Run evaluation suite on the latest chat quality golden tasks. Score accuracy, latency, and cost. Flag any regressions against the previous baseline.
Process the negative signals captured from the last 7 days of production traffic. Cluster failure modes, curate a correction dataset, and emit policy update recommendations.
Audit the current retrieval pipeline for hallucination risk. Optimise source ranking, validate citation quality, and check freshness of cached sources.
Set up structured tracing for the updated pipeline. Configure latency budgets (p50 < 800ms, p99 < 3000ms), cost alerts, and drift detectors. Confirm all trace spans are exported.
